summary: Tested Competition Module upgrade: matches grouped by Jornada (Accordion), Teams tab with kit colors, Line-up editor with visibility control. All features verified working correctly via backend API tests (13/13 passed) and UI testing.

tests: Accordion component displays matches grouped by Jornada
J1 JORNADA 1 badge visible with match count
S/J SEM JORNADA section for matches without matchday
Matches sorted by date within each Jornada
Equipas tab visible with team count (Equipas (1))
Team creation dialog with all fields
12 color inputs for kit colors (6 field player + 6 goalkeeper)
Edit and Delete buttons on team cards
Equipamento Jogador de Campo section with 6 color pickers
Camisola 1ª/2ª, Calções 1ª/2ª, Meias 1ª/2ª for field players
Equipamento Guarda-Redes section with 6 color pickers
LINE-UP DO JOGO dialog opens correctly
Hockey rink (Hóquei em Patins) field visualization
5 position buttons: GR, DE, DD, AE, AD
Jogadores Disponíveis list with team players
Admin can access all competition teams
Team access validation for non-admin users

critical_code_review_comments: ChampionshipDetail.jsx correctly implements Accordion for Jornadas grouping
MatchLineupEditor.jsx has proper hockey rink SVG for roller hockey
Visibility control dropdown has all 4 required options
Backend endpoints properly validate championship_id in request body
RBAC permissions correctly enforced on all operations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing championship and team data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Competition module fully tested: Jornadas accordion (J1, S/J badges), Teams tab with kit colors (12 color inputs), Line-up editor with hockey rink and visibility control (4 options: coach_only, assistant, delegate, assistant_and_delegate). All data-testid attributes working: championship-detail-page, add-match-btn, add-team-btn, team-name-input, lineup-visibility-select, lineup-{match_id}.
